hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|json)$' && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(power\.config\.json|src/generated/services/.*\.ts|src/generated/models/.*\.ts)$' && echo 'BLOCKED: This is an auto-generated file. To update, run: pac code delete-data-source then pac code add-data-source' && exit 1 || exit 0
